data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding the time-limited accept/decline window.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario behavior of a time-limited accept/decline window, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes the process of making an offer when a cancellation occurs, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the system's behavior in enforcing the 2-hour acceptance time or tracking the acceptance window. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the 2-hour acceptance time being tracked or enforced.
